allow: Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where name=''node.exe'' get ProcessId,CommandLine 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,4000,3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess,State | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ''ProcessId=7608 OR ProcessId=5504'' | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 7608,5504 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Killed old processes''; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,State")
Bash(docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate deploy)
